mentions.note: Caller bullish on gold miner margins with high gold prices + cheap oil; Cramer prefers best-in-class (Barrick implicitly); hold Newmont if own, don't add aggressively.
Gold miner, lone non-data-center/non-semiconductor stock on gainers list; Cramer calls it 'classic letdown' to see gold leader instead of growth.

Largest gold miner with woman CEO (first in 104 years). Cramer invited CEO on show, likes Newmont but knows Agnico better. High-quality gold miner in down-from-parabolic environment. Gold ownership (physical and miners) very important.
